about.title: About FIXORA
about.subtitle: Empowering service providers to connect, grow, and succeed

vision.title: Our Vision
content: At FIXORA, we believe that every service provider deserves the tools and platform to succeed in today's digital economy. Our mission is to create a seamless, intuitive, and powerful application that connects providers with customers while streamlining operations and driving growth.
We are committed to building a platform that is not just functional, but transformative—helping providers reach new heights in their business journey.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We continuously evolve our platform with cutting-edge technology and user feedback.

values.title: Reliability
values.description: We ensure our platform is stable, secure, and always available when you need it.

values.title: Support
values.description: We provide comprehensive support to help you succeed every step of the way.

values.title: Growth
values.description: We're committed to your success and provide tools that scale with your business.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Our team consists of passionate developers, designers, and business experts who are dedicated to creating the best possible experience for service providers. We combine technical expertise with deep industry knowledge to deliver solutions that truly make a difference.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started with FIXORA in four simple steps

steps.title: Sign Up
steps.description: Create your account in minutes. Simply download the app and complete your profile with business information.

steps.title: Set Up Your Profile
steps.description: Add your services, availability, and business details to start attracting customers.

steps.title: Get Discovered
steps.description: Customers can find and book your services through our platform. You'll receive notifications for new bookings.

steps.title: Manage & Grow
steps.description: Use our dashboard to manage bookings, track earnings, communicate with customers, and grow your business.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about FIXORA

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Simply download the app from the App Store or Google Play, create an account, and complete your provider profile. You can start accepting bookings within minutes.

items.question: What are the commission rates?
items.answer: Our commission rates vary by plan. Please contact our sales team for detailed pricing information.

items.question: How do I receive payments?
items.answer: Payments are processed securely through our platform. You can choose from multiple payment methods including bank transfer, PayPal, and other options. Payments are typically processed within 2-3 business days.

items.question: Is there a mobile app?
items.answer: Yes! We have native mobile apps for both iOS and Android. You can download them from the App Store or Google Play Store. The apps include all the features of the web platform.

items.question: What kind of support do you offer?
items.answer: We offer 24/7 customer support via live chat, email, and phone. We also have a comprehensive knowledge base with tutorials and guides.

items.question: Can I customize my profile?
items.answer: Yes! You can customize your profile with photos, descriptions, service offerings, and availability. Contact us for information about additional branding customization options.

items.question: How secure is my data?
items.answer: We use enterprise-grade security measures including encryption, secure payment processing, and regular security audits. Your data is protected and we comply with all relevant data protection regulations.

items.question: Can I integrate with other tools?
items.answer: Yes, we offer API access for custom integrations. We also offer integrations with popular business tools. Contact our sales team to discuss your specific integration needs.

cta.title: Still Have Questions?
cta.description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Contact our support team.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you
